Our Fire Alarm Service

Certified
Fire Alarm Systems

Protecting lives and property is our highest priority. Our certified engineers design, install and commission fire alarm systems to BS 5839 standards — and provide the full certification documentation on completion. We also carry out routine servicing and maintenance to keep your system fully compliant.

What's Included

Fire Alarm Services

Whether it's a new installation or an existing system, our certified engineers are ready to help.

01
System Design
Bespoke fire alarm system design for your building's layout and risk profile.
→
02
Installation
Full fire alarm installation — detectors, call points, panels and sounders.
→
03
Commissioning
Full system commissioning with BS 5839 certification on handover.
→
04
Servicing & Maintenance
Scheduled servicing to keep your system compliant and fully operational.
→
05
System Upgrades
Upgrading older or non-compliant systems to current standards.
→
06
Emergency Repairs
Fast response to faults — minimising downtime and keeping your premises protected.
